productDisplayName: CASIO G-Shock Men Black Analogue-Digital Watch GA-100-1A4DR G272
description: Complete with performance features of a digital watch, this casio wrist watch makes for a great stop watch for your fitness as well as an everyday wear, with its various features like a daily alarm, stop watch, full auto calendar and accuracy to name a few. Case diameter: 40 mm Case thickness: 10 mm Dial shape: RoundWarranty: 2 years Rubber case with a fixed bezel for added durability, style and comfort Casio logo at the 6 hour mark Black rubber strap with a tang clasp for comfort White and red dial with lines on the periphery Digital date slot at the 4 hour mark Three chronograph time displays Press button to reset time and alarm Fluorescence to view time in low light conditions Solid case back made of stainless steel for enhanced durability Water resistance up to 200 meters, allowing you to wear it when surfing and scuba diving .To register this product online for warranty, the customer has to visit https://register.casio.in. Post login, please select the 'Online Store' option and follow the steps for registration.
